productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Furious Rides Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front FittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryFlaunt your chilled-out biker attitude in style with this navy blue t-shirt from wrangler. Pay tribute to the brand that set shop in Greensboro and grew to tremendous heights to clothe the world in fabulous wear for a century. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
